arts.ttl: Arnautovic bags a goal and an assist as Inter warms up for Bayern by beating Cagliari 3-1
arts.sum: Marko Arnautovic scored one and set up another as Inter Milan prepared for its Champions League quarterfinal against Bayern Munich with a morale-boosting 3-1 win over Cagliari in Serie A on Sunday. Lautaro Martínez and Yann Bisseck also scored for the Serie A leader to help it move six points clear of Napoli, which hosts relegation-threatened Empoli on Monday.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayer Leverkusen could move for Bayern Munich keeper Alexander Nübel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s forever on loan man, goalkeeper Alexander Nübel, could have an option to find a permanent home soon. Bayer Leverkusen are interested in Alexander Nübel.

arts.ttl: Report: Kingsley Coman requests Bayern Munich exit
arts.sum: Coman has enjoyed a long and successful tenure at Bayern. This could be it for Kingsley Coman at Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich trying to find “common ground” with Max Eberl before situation worsens
arts.sum: In case Eberl ended up leaving Bayern, Frankfurt’s Markus Krösche would be a serious candidate, as his work is appreciated by Bayern bosses. WIl Max Eberl have a brief tenure in Bayern Munich?

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — April 12th, 2025: What’s your prediction for Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will host a desperate Borussia Dortmund side in Der Klassiker today...and the outcome of this match could play a key role in how each team views this season by the end of the campaign. The Bavarians are clinging to a lead in the league, while Borussia Dortmund is desperately trying to claw its way back into a top-four position — which seems like a longshot right now and will be even less likely if BVB falls to Bayern Munich .
